---
title: Café
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557458/latreso_20220218_nvnqbl.png
description: Café
categories: [urbansketch]
date: 2022/02/18
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557458/latreso_20220218_nvnqbl.png)
